differential_diagnoses: Dabrafenib and trametinib-induced systemic inflammatory syndrome
Hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis (HLH) secondary to drug-induced or infection-related immune dysregulation
Drug-induced liver injury (DILI) with systemic hypersensitivity
Adrenal insufficiency related to hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal axis stress or drug effects
next_steps: Perform peripheral blood smear review for morulae and cytopenias
Order HLH diagnostic panel (ferritin, triglycerides, fibrinogen, soluble IL-2 receptor, sCD25)
Assess early morning cortisol and ACTH levels
Perform diagnostic liver biopsy with specialized stains and immunohistochemistry
Consult infectious disease specialist for PCR testing for tickborne pathogens
Perform abdominal MRI/MRCP for detailed evaluation of liver parenchyma and biliary tract
Continue supportive care with fluid resuscitation and avoidance of NSAIDs
